name: HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution - Filter Added
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Thodoris Polyzos (@SmoothDeploy)
SIGMA Title: HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution - Filter Added
SIGMA Description: Detects execution of EDRSilencer, a tool that abuses the Windows Filtering Platform (WFP) to block the outbound traffic of running EDR agents based on specific hardcoded filter names.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('5441', '5447')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%custom outbound filter%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution - Filter Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches devicetype=12 AND ("Event ID" IN('5441', '5447')) AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%custom outbound filter%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: HackTool - EDRSilencer Execution - Filter Added
